name: Orthos
description: The Tenno forged Orthos is a rare double bladed polearm. Those who take the time to master it speak of its impressive striking distance and ability to hit multiple targets.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Tenno forged Orthos is a rare double bladed polearm. Those who take the time to master it speak of its impressive striking distance and ability to hit multiple targets.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Orthos (Prime) changing sizes randomly when cycling through skin options for it, predominantly the Forest-Camo and Tekelu skins.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sugatras clipping through the Warframe’s hands when equipped on the Orthos.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Orthos icon in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Orthos Prime in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some weapons that expand on use not properly collapsing when use is finished (Glaive, Orthos, etc).

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the blade section of the Orthos not being able to be customized.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fix for Orthos Prime appearing on Dakra Prime blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Buffs to Orthos Prime, Slightly faster, bit higher base damage. Longer reach.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for not being able to build Fang Prime or Orthos Prime in Foundry.
